---
title: "Annie Adams"
image: headshot.jpg
toc: false
about:
  template: broadside
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 20em
  links: 
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/annaliese-adams/
    - text: Github
      href: https://github.com/annieradams
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:aradams@ucsb.edu
---

### Hi there! Welcome to my website!
